# No Sales Diagnostic Tree

```text
No sales
├── Did traffic arrive?
│   ├── No → delivery/audience/platform issue
│   └── Yes
├── Did traffic engage?
│   ├── No → attention/relevance issue
│   └── Yes
├── Did visitors inspect proof?
│   ├── No → page/proof mismatch
│   └── Yes
├── Did they start signup/trial/demo?
│   ├── No → offer/risk/friction issue
│   └── Yes
├── Did they activate?
│   ├── No → onboarding/product issue
│   └── Yes
└── Did they pay?
    ├── No → pricing/value/procurement issue
    └── Yes → inspect LTV/CAC and scale
```
